title: Phase 2a: Implement Stripe Payment Integration
description:
Replace mock payment processing with live Stripe integration:

- Integrate Stripe SDK for Node.js backend
- Update checkout flow to create real Stripe payment intents
- Handle Stripe webhooks for payment confirmation
- Update admin panel to display real payment status
- Test with Stripe test keys in staging
- Document Stripe configuration for production

Parent: [PHWA-54](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-54) (Bingo Full Build)
Dependency: [PHWA-56](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-56) must be live

title: Phase 2b: Add Email Confirmation Notifications
description:
Implement SendGrid email integration for booking confirmations:

- Integrate SendGrid SDK for transactional emails
- Send booking confirmation email with reference number
- Send cancellation confirmation emails
- Add email template management to admin panel
- Test email delivery in staging
- Document SendGrid API key configuration

Parent: [PHWA-54](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-54)
Dependency: [PHWA-56](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-56) must be live

title: Phase 2c: Build Customer Accounts & Login System
description:
Add customer registration and login for booking history:

- Create customer registration form (email/password)
- Implement JWT-based authentication
- Add customer dashboard showing booking history
- Allow customers to view/cancel their own bookings
- Add password reset functionality
- Implement session persistence across browser restarts

Parent: [PHWA-54](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-54)
Dependency: [PHWA-56](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-56) must be live

title: Phase 2d: Configure Production Domain & SSL
description:
Move Bingo system from render.onrender.com to custom domain:

- Purchase or use client's domain (e.g., bingo.smec.ca)
- Configure DNS records pointing to Render deployment
- Set up SSL certificate (Render auto-provides Let's Encrypt)
- Update admin credentials for production
- Configure environment variables for production
- Verify HTTPS and security headers
- Test full booking flow on production domain

Parent: [PHWA-54](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-54)
Dependency: [PHWA-56](/PHWA/issues/PHWA-56) must be live
